DISCUSSED AND COURT MODIFIES THE TENTATIVE RULING. THE ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD SHOULD BE COMPLETED THIS WEEK. MATTER CONTINUED FROM SEP-10-2007 TO OCT-16-2007, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. Order To Show Cause Hearing For The San Francisco City Attonrey'S Office To Show Cause Why The Administrative Record Has Not Been Completed
Off Calendar Jan-29-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER ELBA GUTIERREZ-SAENZ'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE.
APPEARANCES: RAQUEL FOX, ESQUIRE (TENDERLOIN HEARING CLINIC, 415.771.9850) APPEARING FOR PETITIONER. WAYNE K. SNODGRASS, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY (OFFICE OF THE CITY ATTORNEY, 415.554.4675) APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT. JOANNA KOZUBAL, ESQUIRE (415.864.6962) AND BRENDA CRUZ KEITH (415.626.6494) APPEARING FOR REAL PARTY IN INTEREST PINEDA.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING:
THE WRIT OF MANDATE IS DENIED. SEE WORD MINUTES FOR ENTIRE TENTATIVE RULING. COURT WILL ALLOW FURTHER BRIEFING ON THE ISSUE OF A STAY. SAID BRIEFING IS TO BE SUBMITTED BY THE CLOSE OF BUSINESS ON JANUARY 30, 2008. COURT WILL TAKE THE ISSUE OF THE STAY UNDER SUBMISSION ON JANUARY 30, 2008. ORDER SIGNED ON THE WRIT OF MANDATE. (302/PJM/301-LB) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

Order To Show Cause Hearing For The San Francisco City Attonrey'S Office To Show Cause Why The Administrative Record Has Not Been Completed
Off Calendar Oct-16-2007 Continued To Jan-29-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Petitioner's Order to Show Cause why the Administrative Record has not been completed

Appearances:
Wayne K. Snodgrass of the City Attorney's Office, 554.4675, appearing for respondent
Raquel Fox of the Tenderloin Housing Clinic, 771.9850 x115, appearing for petitioner and moving party

This matter was not argued, and the parties represented to the Court that the Administrative Record has been completed. The parties presented the Court with a stipulation and proposed order to continue the hearing to January 29, 2008, and set a briefing schedule. The Order was signed in open Court. (302/DEW/LB) Judge Diane E. Wick, Reporter Maria Torreano, CSR #8600

MINI MINUTES:

ATTY. JOANNA KOZUBAL, TEL. NO. 350-9967 APPEARING FOR THE OPPOSING AND REAL PARTIES IN INTEREST.
